name: reflexion_verbal_memory_gate

source.name: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
source.evidence: web_extract returned arXiv id 2303.11366, CC-BY-4.0 license, and abstract describing verbal reflection over task feedback stored in episodic memory without weight updates.

mechanism: feedback_signal -> verbal reflection -> episodic memory -> next attempt outcome; gate accepts memory only if score/pass improves and repeated-error rate remains bounded
boundaries: Does not copy external Reflexion code.
Does not implement model fine-tuning or online RL.
Core code integrated only into apex_devour CLI as an auditable gate.
